reviews.body: This Momcozy hands-free breast pump is amazing! It comes with 2 hands-free pumps, 2 USB-C charger cords, different size flanges, a nipple measurement card, and a carrying case. Its very lightweight and convenient for travel. I love the hands-free feature of this breast pump. Im able to just slide them in my bra and continue to do other things. The suction is very strong, Ive had no issues with them falling off. They are also very quiet, and the battery seems to last quite a while. I have to say that as much as I love this Momcozy breast pump, I do think the price is a little high for this product. There are other brands that work just as well for cheaper. Thats really my only complaint about this item. Overall, everything else about this breast pump Im very much satisfied with.
reviews.productName: M5 Smart Bra Bundle: Double M5 Smart Breast Pump and Jelly Strip Bra(YN46)
reviews.title: Great hands-free pump

reviews.body: This is an ok pump. The pull on it is different than others and not necessarily in a good way. This has a very short flange tunnel so I don t recommend for people with elastic nipples even if you re using maymom long or similar inserts. It s not overly loud but people will definitely hear this if they get close. I guess if it was on sale I wouldn t mind considering to buy it but this isn t something I d go out of my way to get.
reviews.productName: M5 Smart Bra Bundle: Double M5 Smart Breast Pump and Jelly Strip Bra(YN46)
reviews.title: M5 pump

reviews.body: This pair is performing well. They re comfortable to wear and great for travel. The rechargeable feature is very nice especially because it s USB-C which is a cable everyone has, and usually has 10 of them, rather than a microUSB or some proprietary cord requiring you to carry more stuff around.  It stows easily in most bags and doesn t take up much room making it both discreet and very portable, however it s not as compact as a single pump system if space is an issue. It s easy to get set up and the pumps, while quiet, have adequate power. In fact, there are various levels to choose from to dial it in to just the right amount of power for your comfort. The display is clear and easy to read. There are a good number of accessories and the whole set is easy to clean. Make sure to shop around for the most competitive price, there is no shortage of these available these days.
reviews.productName: M5 Smart Bra Bundle: Double M5 Smart Breast Pump and Jelly Strip Bra(YN46)
reviews.title: Comfortable pumps with low noise.

reviews.body: I would have given a 5 star, however I was a little disappointed to find that the pump did not come with the 2 momcozy bags, and 27mm flanges, or a brush to clean. I watched unboxings of the momcozy m5 and was looking forward to all the accessories but I guess at some point they decided to cut back on all that. I had to order the 27mm flange separate because I wasnt expecting this not to have it! I always need the biggest size. Overall the pump is amazing and suction is great, was just very disappointed in the lack of accessories it came with now then it had before.
reviews.productName: M5 Smart Bra Bundle: Double M5 Smart Breast Pump and Jelly Strip Bra(YN46)
reviews.title: Love but disappointed in accessories

reviews.body: Works as advertised and I couldn t be any happier. I own other products from Momcozy and it s products never disappoint with quality. Love all the attachments included and that it allows me to be hands free with my baby and while doing other home tasks. These are a real life saver! They are easy to use and clean. The suction is perfect and they ve helped me maintain my milk supply.
reviews.productName: M5 Smart Bra Bundle: Double M5 Smart Breast Pump and Jelly Strip Bra(YN46)
reviews.title: Great Pump!

reviews.body: Snagged this for hopes that it can be a good replacement for my older pump thats been there for me with two babies, and so far its working out great. This does come with everything you need, and glad that I didnt need to grab extra accessories in case my fit isnt included. Its not a wall pump, which is exactly what I was hoping for, and love how I can do cooking or chores while this is wotking (and a bonus is how this fits comfortably under y ur clothes and doesnt bulge at all. So its moderately discreet- careful wearing tight shirts!). Also, just glad that I dont need to adjust the fit too much once I first start using this. There was a tiny amount of leaking in one side upon the first use, but none on the next usage which was odd. It does get a bit noisy, but nothing too extremely distracting or disrupting. The feel of the suction is literally how it feels when you feed your baby, so I really liked the natural sensation of this and most importantly the pain is dramatically less in contrast to my other pump. Overall, very good pump and quite a nice upgrade! Im happy with this for now.
reviews.productName: M5 Smart Bra Bundle: Double M5 Smart Breast Pump and Jelly Strip Bra(YN46)
reviews.title: Think I found my replacement for my older pump!

reviews.body: My wife and I had our second baby 2 weeks ago. She started pumping with her m5 pumps immediately after the baby was born. Unfortunately one of the pumps started not working after a few days. I'm writing this review to tell everyone how incredible momcozy customer support is! After a few emails back amd forth, momcozy gave us some pointers on possible fixes. After they didn't work momcozy sent us 2 brand new pumps at no cost to us! The customer service is amazing and we couldn't be happier! Every product from every company has issues sometimes, but not all companies stand behind thier products like this. Thank you so much momcozy!
reviews.productName: M5 Smart Bra Bundle: Double M5 Smart Breast Pump and Jelly Strip Bra(YN46)
reviews.title: M5 pumps

reviews.body: The MomCozy handsfree breast pump is compact, portable, discreet, comfortable, easy to clean, whats not to love? Busy moms dont have four hands, so having a handsfree breast pump is an absolute game changer. They attach easily and comfortably with soft silicone flanges, and somewhat discreetly under your clothes. Easily transportable which is great for when maternity leave is over and you are pumping at the office. Cleaning is a breeze as well. If you are on the fence, just get it. Being a mom is the most amazing, yet the most exhausting time of your life. Why not have products that truly make the day-to-day tasks easier.
reviews.productName: M5 Smart Bra Bundle: Double M5 Smart Breast Pump and Jelly Strip Bra(YN46)
reviews.title: Handsfree pumping!

reviews.body: I was nervous about ordering but this has exceeded my expectations! Slightly heavy but I didn t know what to expect. I was worried about it being such a great price but it is a great product and has a great price tag!
reviews.productName: M5 Smart Bra Bundle: Double M5 Smart Breast Pump and Jelly Strip Bra(YN46)
reviews.title: Great option at a great price

reviews.body: I was looking for an all inclusive to pump while I was working so I could stay working and this was my best option. It has a good suction and the pump parts clean easily.  Love that it comes with a carrying case too. Great pump
reviews.productName: M5 Smart Bra Bundle: Double M5 Smart Breast Pump and Jelly Strip Bra(YN46)
reviews.title: The best
